<Meta title="api/Widget" />
<DocsHeader title="Widget" breadCrumbs="API reference » Widget" type="Component">
  [Properties](#properties) · [Returns](#returns)
</DocsHeader>

Selects and renders a matching widget for the given JsonNode

```tsx
import { useEditor, Widget } from '@sagold/react-json-editor';

function WebFormComponent() {
  const editor = useEditor(options);
  const node = editor.getNode();

  return <Widget node={node} editor={editor} options={options} />;
}
```

## Properties

### `props: WidgetProps`

The widget props

#### node
<Code>{`node: T;`}</Code>



#### editor
<Code>{`editor: Editor;`}</Code>



#### options
<Code>{`options?: Partial<T['options']>;`}</Code>



## Returns

**`JSX.Element | null`** matching WidgetComponent from WidgetPlugins or null
